favorite_places_app_venues_hint: Pick from venues listed on DineBuddies
guest_post_prompt: Sign in to share a post with the community.
invitations_screen_subtitle: Discover open invites nearby or start your own.
notification_invite_unavailable: This invitation is no longer available.
private_ai_schedule_venue_required: Set the date, time, and location first — then AI can draft your message.
private_ai_text_fields_hint: Use AI above to draft the title and message, or write them yourself.
private_card_show_content_title: Off: date and place only on the card. On: show title, message, and profile photo.
private_card_theme_color_hint: One color for the frame and all text. Plain — no shadow on text.
private_invitee_not_available: This member is not available for private invites.
private_no_available_invitees: No one you follow is open to private invites. Follow members who accept Private Invite.
private_pick_date_create_hint: Only members who accept private invites appear here (consumer accounts only).
private_pick_date_preview: Choose who you are inviting below (optional for external link).
private_send_invite_confirm: Send a Private Invite invitation to ${displayName}?
profile_gallery_hint: Add up to 3 portrait photos (9:16). Tap the star to choose which one appears in Discover & the member list.
social_invitation_access_denied: You do not have access to this invitation.
social_invitation_blocked_host: You cannot view invitations from this person.
ai_deploy_api_hint: Make sure you use the deployed domain with /api (redeploy if needed).
ai_prompt_optional_hint: Optional — leave blank to use form details.
ai_session_expired: Your session expired or the token is invalid. Sign out and sign in again.
biz_plan_free_feat_directory: Public listing when profile is published
biz_plan_free_feat_google_import: Google Business data from admin import (display)
biz_plan_free_feat_links_view_only: Website, map & social visible — open links requires Paid
biz_plan_dashboard_paid_hint: Upgrade to access your dashboard, stats, and business tools.
biz_plan_motion_paid_hint: Upgrade to create and publish motion posts.
biz_plan_featured_paid_hint: Upgrade to create and publish featured posts.
biz_plan_analytics_paid_only: Advanced analytics is a Paid Business feature
biz_plan_analytics_paid_hint: Upgrade to see ranking breakdown, engagement points, and performance insights.
biz_dashboard_archive_empty: No hosted invitations in the archive yet.
biz_dashboard_analytics_hint: Points determine your position in business rankings.
image_upload_please_wait: Please wait — do not close the app
unhandled_invitations_reminder_title: You have invitations waiting for your response
unhandled_invitations_reminder_body: Private and private invites are still pending. Review them and accept or decline.
personal_invite_subtitle: Invite one person for a spontaneous meetup — pick the category that fits.
personal_invite_cat_friendship_desc: Get to know each other — relaxed, no pressure.
personal_invite_cat_icebreaker_desc: A light, natural way to break the ice.
social_cover_ai_preview_failed: The cover was generated but the preview could not load. Try again in a moment.
social_external_invite_create_hint: After you publish, share a link via WhatsApp, SMS, or Messenger. The recipient signs up to respond — you send from your own account.
social_external_invite_title: Invite someone not on the app
social_external_share_hint: Share the link via WhatsApp, SMS, or Messenger. The recipient signs up to respond — you send from your own account.
social_external_share_image_hint: Share the invitation as an image with a link. On WhatsApp, Telegram, and SMS the card preview should appear when your device supports image sharing.
social_external_share_title: Invite someone not on the app
social_no_in_app_invitees: No in-app guests yet — you can still share externally after sending.
social_preview_recipient_view: This is how your invitation will look to recipients.
social_preview_share_after_send: After you send the invitation, share it as an image via WhatsApp, Telegram, SMS, or Messenger.
social_preview_leave_question: Save your invitation draft before leaving preview?
social_share_image_missing: Could not capture the invitation card.
social_share_image_saved_attach: Invitation image saved — attach it in your chat app if it did not open automatically.
social_share_image_text_only: Link shared. Use Share again on mobile to send the invitation image.
social_pick_date_preview: Choose who you are inviting below (optional for external link).
social_share_via_messaging_hint: Opens your phone share menu — choose Messages, WhatsApp, Instagram, or Save to Photos.
social_share_android_retry_hint: Invitation is ready — tap Share once more to open the share menu.
social_share_sheet_failed: Could not open the share menu. Copy the message below or try again.
social_ai_schedule_venue_required: Set the date, time, and location first — then AI can draft your message.
social_sms_open_failed: Could not open the messaging app.
social_sms_open_hint: Shares the invitation image with the link — pick Messages or SMS to send.
social_sms_opened_attach: Messages opened with the link. Attach the invitation image from your gallery, add recipients, then send.
social_sms_opened_clipboard: Messages opened with the link. Paste the invitation image if needed, add recipients, then send.
social_sms_shared_with_image: Choose Messages or SMS — the invitation image and link are ready to send.
social_invitation_draft_saved: Invitation saved. You can continue editing or open preview.
social_send_requires_invitee_or_share: Select at least one person in the app, or share the invitation once via messaging.
social_send_requires_one_or_share: Pick one person on the app (max 1), or share once via messaging before sending.
social_send_with_selected_or_share: Your date is selected below. Send in the app, or share via messaging.
social_send_invite_confirm: Send a Private Invite invitation to {{name}}?
social_pick_date_create_hint: Only members who accept private invites appear here (consumer accounts only).
social_no_available_invitees: No one you follow is open to private invites. Follow members who accept Private Invite.
social_invitee_not_available: This member is not available for private invites.
social_invite_claim_failed: Could not open this invitation. Try again.
social_invite_guest_body: Create a free DineBuddies account to accept or decline this invitation.
social_invite_guest_body_named: {{host}} sent you a private invitation. Create a free account to accept or decline.
social_invite_landing_subtitle: Join DineBuddies free to accept or decline — it only takes a few seconds.
social_invite_landing_subtitle_named: Join DineBuddies free to accept or decline {{host}}\
social_invite_viewing_now: You are viewing a private invitation
social_invite_link_invalid: This invitation link is invalid or has expired.
social_invite_published_share: Invitation sent! Share the link with anyone not on the app.
social_share_cta_line: Open the link to view the invitation and respond:
social_share_outside_app_hint: Sends the invitation image and a link to DineBuddies. App members should be invited with «Send to app members» above.
social_share_card_and_app_hint: Shares the invitation card image with event details and your DineBuddies profile link.
social_share_app_link_hint: Shared the invitation card. Recipients can join you on DineBuddies via the link.
social_share_ios_paste_hint: Invitation text and link copied! Paste them if they don't appear when sharing the image.
social_share_link_error: Could not create the share link.
social_share_rate_limited: Please wait a moment before trying again.
social_share_image_only_hint: Shared the invitation image. The link could not be created yet — try again in a minute.
social_share_message_generic: You have a private invitation on DineBuddies
block_member_confirm: Block this member? They will be removed and cannot rejoin until unblocked.
mute_member_confirm: Mute this member? They can read the chat but cannot write or react.
unmute_member_confirm: Allow this member to write in the group chat again?
member_unblocked_success: Member unblocked — they can join again
community_chat_muted: You are muted in this community chat.
community_chat_muted_notice: You are muted in this chat and cannot send messages.
user_directory_subtitle: Discover members, send private invites, or send a gift.
user_directory_load_error: Could not load members. Try again.
user_directory_gift_coming_soon: Gifts are coming soon — we will add them in a future update.
story_owner_comments_playing: Showing all comments — story paused. Tap again to skip.
story_owner_no_comments: Reactions and replies will appear here.
studio_close_question: Do you want to save this post as a draft before closing?
studio_close_kept_session: Your work will be restored when you return.
